With deepest respect and prayers,
Hassan Ahmad Kayani

هند المجد وتاريخ علوانك وشانك 
هند ام الشيوخ ترسم الخير بناينك 
هند الغلا والغزلان حولك ورعيانك 
هند ام راشد واحمد وحمدان مكتوم 
يهنالك بوجودك وعلوانك رسمتي دبي 
بالحب والخير دارك وميزانك منو يقول 
هند وهند امجادها تحلالك دبي شبيهت هند 
وصارت الدار دراك ترمز خطوط حبك برمز الوفاء علوانك 
انتي ومحمد رسمتو دبي بلوحه الجدران  من تشجيعك وشانك 
وصارت دبي عيون هند تتشبه ولمحمد المجد شموخ ومجد شامخ فوووق 
وبالعيال هم الشيوخ تتلال بركانك بجمال ساااحر ياسلام العز بعلوانك
دبي تفتخر الأرض والبحر ببرج شامخ والأمواج تعزف لحن بقدرك ومقدارك 
والبحر بالشواطي النخل تاااثير وميثار عيون الهند  والصقر يحلق بالسماء 
كنه يلحن عنوان هند ومحمد بقلم ياثر الا  طيور المحبه بالسلا والسلام 
تاريخ كم مجد والدفتر لو نكتب من المساء للفجر  شو نعبر ولو نشعر ويش نقول 
كنا نكتب بالشعر الفصيح لا نقدر بذكر هند آلا يكون الكلام احتول 
وحتى قلم او دفتر لن يكمل وصف منحوت بالإمارات تأريخ دورك منشانك بالصخور 
نكتب وننحت محمد مكمل هند وهند تكمل بمحمد ودبي جز بين ذراعين الحنان 
والامانه بين اهل  دار زايد تحيه لكم بعنبر العود تغرد الريحان لكم يا أهل داري وبحكم امي وأبي وحكاامي ♡♡

Bela homenagem.  Bonito ver sua Alteza dando a devida e merecida importância a sua genitiora. Uma mãe ocupa na vida de todos nós a maior importância possível. É grandiosa,  magnanime,  depois no nosso Deus criador,  uma mãe é de extrema importância,  é fundamental na lista de pessoas que temos que amar,  respeitar,  que temos em alta conta.  Aqui na terra,  uma mãe é tudo,  os pais também.  Mas uma mãe ainda é maior,  está em primeiro lugar.  A mãe que gesta,  gera os filhos,  passa pelo desconforto de uma gravidez,  sente a dor do parto,  amamenta,  cuida,  tem maior trabalho e preocupação com os filhos.  Enfim o papel de uma mãe é maior,  por isso merecem todo o respeito e consideração do mundo,  e todas as homenagens possíveis.  Em uma das leis e mandamentos do Senhor Deus,  ele disse "Honrrai pai e mãe,  para que seus dias se prolongue na terra". E sua Alteza Prince Hamdan,  honra e respeita seus país,  por isso e por tudo de bom que és,  seus dias  e sua vida serão prolongados.  Se depender disso,  Deus já prolongou seus dias. In the golden sands where the falcon flies,
A prince walks gently, under azure skies.
His heart beats strong for children’s cheer,
And animals he holds so dear.

In the laughter of kids, he finds his peace,
Their joy is a melody that will never cease.
He rides with grace on the desert's back,
Through dunes that whisper tales of the track.

The camels stride, the horse's race,
In every creature, he finds grace.
A lion’s roar, a falcon’s flight,
Under the moon’s serene light.

Dubai’s towers touch the stars,
Yet his world is found in what’s not far.
A love for life, both wild and free,
A guardian of the land and sea.

For in the desert’s endless sweep,
A bond with nature, pure and deep.
Prince Hamdan, with a gentle hand,
Bridges hearts across the land.

We hope for Your assistance in expediting the process and providing the necessary support for the successful realization of our project.
Respectfully, Svetlana Lukianova

Your Highness Prince Hamdan,
We deeply appreciate all efforts aimed at supporting cultural and educational initiatives in Dubai. Unfortunately, due to bureaucratic delays and lengthy responses, as well as the inability to establish direct contact with key officials in the departments, our project — **Al-Farabi Arabian Perfumery University** — is facing difficulties in obtaining the necessary support.
Our project is focused on preserving the cultural heritage of Dubai and strengthening the city's position as a global leader in education and innovation. We sincerely believe that the implementation of this project will bring significant benefits to the city and its residents, and contribute to further enhancing Dubai's international reputation.
We hope for Your assistance in expediting the process and providing the necessary support for the successful realization of our project.
Respectfully, Svetlana Lukianova
